reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://thewirecutter.com/reviews/best-clothing-steamers/ and extract every clothing steamer they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, steam time, heat-up time, weight, water tank size, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.goodhousekeeping.com/appliances/g1988/best-garment-steamers/ and extract every garment steamer they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, key specs, pros with specific GH Institute test results, cons.

Go to https://www.thespruce.com/best-clothes-steamer-4159759 and extract every clothes steamer they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, heat-up time, steam duration, key features, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.cnn.com/cnn-underscored/reviews/best-clothes-steamer and extract every clothes steamer they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, steam settings, heat-up time, pros with specific fabric test results, cons.

Go to https://www.hgtv.com/shopping/product-reviews/best-clothes-steamers and extract every clothes steamer they review. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, key specs, pros with specific details, cons.
